title: Tax-Saving Season
scenario: It's tax-planning season. You can invest in tax-saving instruments (like ELSS or PPF) that also build long-term wealth, or scramble for random receipts. What do you do?

choices.label: Buy random stuff just to save tax
choices.lesson: Spending money only to 'save tax' is backwards — you lose more than you save. Tax breaks should reward things you'd want to do anyway.

choices.label: Use a tax-saving investment
choices.lesson: Some tax-saving options double as long-term investments — you reduce tax and build wealth at once. Plan them early, not in a last-minute panic.
